vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1337

plan.title: Epic-3: Harden Go installer for non-interactive agent use

narratives.Description: Epic-3: Harden Go installer for non-interactive agent use
narratives.Overview:
## Summary
Add robust non-interactive support to the published \deft-install\ binary so agents can reliably use it for fresh installs and upgrades.

## Acceptance Criteria
- \--yes\ / \--non-interactive\ mode works without hanging on prompts
- \--upgrade\ mode supported
- \--repo-root\ and \--json\ supported
- Windows UAC/installer detection issues addressed or documented

## Testing Requirements
- Go tests in \cmd/deft-install/*_test.go\
- CLI integration tests in \	ests/cli/\ exercising installer flows

## Labels
installer, enhancement

items.title: \--yes\ / \--non-interactive\ mode works without hanging on prompts
Windows UAC/installer detection issues addressed or documented

references.title: Issue #1337: Epic-3: Harden Go installer for non-interactive agent use
